description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is primarily white with a prominent dark gray section on one side, adding visual contrast. Large rectangular windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a green lawn patch, flanked by two sets of windows on each side. Subtle horizontal black accents break up the white facade, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The roof is flat and appears to be covered with a textured material, likely gravel or concrete.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and dark gray exterior, and large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway recessed in the center, flanked by large windows and a green lawn patch beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the white facade with black horizontal accents and several large windows, as well as the protruding dark gray section at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view features a prominent dark gray section with windows, contrasting with the otherwise white exterior and flat roof.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays more large windows and the continuation of the flat roof, with the dark gray section visible at the corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway with a green lawn patch, no visible steps or porch, and minimalist styling.
